details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest weekday evening beginner pottery class next month under $45
Task 2: Purchase an annual family membership with class discount
Task 3: Enroll a 9-year-old in a multi-week class under $150 (adapted)
Task 4: Register for two classes with combined cost <= $120 (adapted)
Task 5: Reserve seat in middle price tier for Friday 7pm theater performance this month (adapted to 1 seat)
Task 6: Use an existing class pass to register for the next beginner class (adapted)
Task 7: RSVP for 2 adults to earliest free music event this week
Task 8: Make a one-time donation to Scholarship Fund in honor of someone
Task 9: Follow ceramics instructor (4+ rating) and save one of their classes under $60 to wishlist
